form.formComment: Most recently 3rd in a small field at Osmangazi All Weather on April 3 over 1400m, 9 len behind Boundless Power carrying 60kg at $2.50. The run before that of 7 at Yesiloba All Weather on March 29 over 1900m, 20 len behind Empire Man with 60.5kg at $6. Made headway last time. Top chance.

form.formComment: Returns from a 49-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1200m, 18 len behind Tolper carrying 51kg at $5.60. The start before that 5th of 7 at this track on January 11 over 1200m, 5 len behind Black Shark carrying 56.5kg at $1.50. Can make amends.
